name: IS
title: HL7 v2 IS Data Type
description: A coded value drawn from a user-defined code system (a user-defined table). The value should match one of the codes defined in the associated user-defined table, though user-defined tables may be extended by local agreement. The specific table is identified in the field definition where this data type is used.

element.definition: A coded value drawn from a user-defined code system (a user-defined table). The value should match one of the codes defined in the associated user-defined table, though user-defined tables may be extended by local agreement.
